content.text: Iman (faith) refers to belief in fundamental articles: Allah, His angels, His books, His messengers, the Last Day, and divine decree (qadar).

items: Belief in Allah — the One, without partners.
Belief in the angels created by Allah.
Belief in the revealed Books (including the Quran).
Belief in the Prophets and Messengers (including Muhammad, peace be upon him).
Belief in the Last Day (resurrection, judgment).
Belief in Divine Decree (qadar): good and bad from Allah.

content.text: Faith increases with righteous deeds, remembrance of Allah, and sincere intention; it is expressed through both belief and practice.
Ikhlas — sincerity of intention — and regular repentance (tawbah) are essential dimensions of iman.
Iman is not only words but a living commitment expressed through action and heart.
